mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bgm_tracks WHERE active=1 AND title LIKE %s ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM bgm_tracks WHERE active=1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM bgm_tracks WHERE id=%s AND active=1
SELECT * FROM bgm_tracks WHERE title LIKE %s ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM bgm_tracks ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as so FROM bgm_tracks
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bgm_tracks(title, filename, saved_name, file_size, sort_order) VALUES(%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE bgm_tracks SET title=%s, active=%s WHERE id=%s
UPDATE bgm_tracks SET sort_order=%s WHERE id=%s
